steps.description: Click on 'Get API Key' in the navigation bar.
User is redirected to the sign-in page at accounts.tinyfish.ai.

blockers.detail: Entry point is accessible without login.

evidence.notes: The 'Get API Key' button in the header serves as the primary entry point to the authentication system.

steps.description: Click the 'Get API Key' card in the 'Get Started' section of the homepage.
User is directed to the sign-up page at accounts.tinyfish.ai.

blockers.detail: Registration screen is accessible without login.

evidence.notes: A secondary call-to-action card specifically mentions signing up.
labels_seen: Get API Key - Sign up and start automating

entry_points.label: Get API Key - Sign up and start automating

blockers.detail: No entry point found for password reset.

evidence.notes: No 'Forgot password' or 'Reset password' link was visible on the sign-in or sign-up pages, even when visually inspected via screenshot. This may be due to the authentication provider (Clerk) configuration.

result_raw.notes: The authentication flow is handled by accounts.tinyfish.ai (Clerk). While Sign In and Sign Up entry points are clearly present on the documentation homepage, a password reset mechanism was not found during the scouting process.

global_blockers.detail: Accessing the actual agent dashboard or API key management requires a successful login.
